color.description: Background fill — a theme name (primary, success…) or any CSS color. Neutral if unset.

size.description: Pixel size (number or '70'), or a named size (x-small, small, default, large, x-large).

icon.description: A leading icon, shown when there's no image.

text.description: Initials — shown when there's no image/icon. 1–5 chars show as-is; longer text reduces to one letter per word.

circle.description: Render a full circle instead of the default rounded square.

badgePosition.description: Badge corner — top-right, top-left, bottom-left, or bottom-right (default).

history.description: Draw a colored story ring around the avatar (follows `color`).

writing.description: Show animated typing dots in the badge.

pointer.description: Use a pointer cursor, for clickable avatars.

default.description: Avatar content when there's no image/icon/text (e.g. custom initials).

badge.description: Custom badge content (e.g. a count); turns the dot into a pill.

icons.description: A side panel of action icons revealed beside the avatar.
